category.scope_note: Hand-held, transportable, and lawn/garden electric and cordless power tools exported from China to Jordan.

title.en: China-to-Jordan Power Tool Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动工具进入约旦：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動工具進入約旦：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China power-tool compliance against Jordan JSMO technical regulation, conformity certificate, electrical safety, EMC, radio/TRC, occupational and substance requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动工具合规与约旦 JSMO 技术法规、符合性证书、电气安全、电磁兼容、无线电/TRC、职业安全及物质要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動工具合規與約旦 JSMO 技術法規、符合性證書、電氣安全、電磁相容、無線電/TRC、職業安全及物質要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-body assessment, customs determination, market-access approval, or product-safety design review. Exporters and importers should verify current Jordan JSMO technical regulations, adopted JS/GSO/IEC standards, TRC radio rules, and destination-country enforcement practice with qualified professionals before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构评审、海关裁定、市场准入批准或产品安全设计评审。出口商和进口商在出货前应与合格专业人士核验现行约旦 JSMO 技术法规、采用的 JS/GSO/IEC 标准、TRC 无线电规则及目的国执法实践。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構評審、海關裁定、市場准入批准或產品安全設計評審。出口商和進口商在出貨前應與合格專業人士核驗現行約旦 JSMO 技術法規、採用的 JS/GSO/IEC 標準、TRC 無線電規則及目的國執法實務。

answer_first.en: For China-made electric or cordless power tools entering Jordan, the mandatory baseline is conformity with applicable JSMO technical regulations and a conformity certificate, with JS standards that adopt IEC/GSO/EN such as IEC 62841 used to show safety; cordless tools with wireless functions also need TRC type approval. Jordan uses 230 V, 50 Hz, so the 50 Hz frequency matches China but the nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的有线或无绳电动工具进入约旦，强制基线是符合适用的 JSMO 技术法规并取得符合性证书，安全性通常通过采用 IEC/GSO/EN 的 JS 标准（如 IEC 62841）证明；带无线功能的无绳工具还需 TRC 型号核准。约旦电网为 230 V、50 Hz，频率与中国同为 50 Hz，但标称电压不同于中国的 220/380 V。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的有線或無繩電動工具進入約旦，強制基線是符合適用的 JSMO 技術法規並取得符合性證書，安全性通常通過採用 IEC/GSO/EN 的 JS 標準（如 IEC 62841）證明；帶無線功能的無繩工具還需 TRC 型號核准。約旦電網為 230 V、50 Hz，頻率與中國同為 50 Hz，但標稱電壓不同於中國的 220/380 V。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set true. Official regulator, standards body, conformity body, customs, or primary legal source preferred.
